name: DeepSeek Coder 33B
license: DeepSeek Model License (custom, commercial use permitted)
note: DeepSeek's first public model; open code LLM trained 87% code, beat Codex/GPT-3.5-turbo on HumanEval.
tpsNote: Q4 (~20GB) fits within a 24GB RTX 4090, but no verified specific tokens/sec benchmark was found for this exact configuration.

results.notes: HumanEval Python, Instruct-33B, from paper Table 3

RepoBench v1.1 exact match (EM), averaged across the Python and Java splits reported in Table 17 of the StarCoder2 & The Stack v2 paper (Lozhkov et al., 2024), which benchmarks DeepSeekCoder-33B alongside StarCoder2 and CodeLlama: Python EM 39.25, Java EM 44.59. DeepSeekCoder-33B is the top scorer of all base models in this table.

verificationNotes: Confirmed via huggingface.co/deepseek-ai/deepseek-coder-33b-instruct (33B dense, 16K context, 2T tokens 87% code/13% NL in English+Chinese, MIT repo license + commercial-use model license) and via ar5iv/2401.14196 Table 3, which literally shows HumanEval 79.3 and MBPP 70.0 for DeepSeek-Coder-Instruct 33B. Nov 2023 release corroborated by web search (Internet Archive snapshot of the GitHub repo dated 2023-11-09, consistent with an early-Nov launch).
